input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule T.1.5.1 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: t.1.5.1
            TITLE: the driver’s seat must be protected by one of the following:

            CONTENT:
            rule T.1.5.1: The Driver’s Seat must be protected by one of the following:
T.1.5.1 The Driver’s Seat must be protected by one of the following: 
a. In side view, the lowest point of any Driver’s Seat must be no lower than the upper 
surface of the lowest structural tube or equivalent 
b. A longitudinal tube (or tubes) that meets the requirements for Side Impact tubing 
(F.3.2.1.e), passing underneath the lowest point of the Driver Seat.

final_answer: rule T.1.5.1: The Driver’s Seat must be protected by one of the following: T.1.5.1 The Driver’s Seat must be protected by one of the following: a. In side view, the lowest point of any Driver’s Seat must be no lower than the upper surface of the lowest structural tube or equivalent b. A longitudinal tube (or tubes) that meets the requirements for Side Impact tubing (F.3.2.1.e), passing underneath the lowest point of the Driver Seat.
